controls.title: SQL servers require a minimum TLS version
controls.description: Azure SQL servers must declare TLS 1.2 or later.

controls.title: SQL servers must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure a private endpoint.

controls.title: SQL servers must restrict outbound network access
controls.description: Outbound network access from Azure SQL must be explicitly restricted.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers must disable public network access
controls.description: PostgreSQL flexible servers must use delegated networking or private endpoints.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure private connectivity.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers should use geo-redundant backups
controls.description: Production PostgreSQL servers should protect backups against regional failure.
controls.remediation: Set geo_redundant_backup_enabled = true where the selected region and SKU support it.

controls.title: MySQL flexible servers must disable public network access
controls.description: MySQL flexible servers must use delegated networking or private endpoints.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure private connectivity.

controls.title: MySQL flexible servers should use geo-redundant backups
controls.description: Production MySQL servers should protect backups against regional failure.
controls.remediation: Set geo_redundant_backup_enabled = true where the selected region and SKU support it.

controls.title: Cosmos DB accounts must disable public network access
controls.description: Cosmos DB accounts must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Set public_network_access_enabled = false and configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Cosmos DB accounts must disable local authentication
controls.description: Cosmos DB clients must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of account keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_authentication_disabled = true and grant Cosmos DB data-plane roles.

controls.title: Cosmos DB accounts must require TLS 1.2
controls.description: Cosmos DB must reject legacy TLS protocol versions.

controls.title: Cosmos DB accounts should enable automatic failover
controls.description: Multi-region Cosmos DB accounts should automate regional failover.
controls.remediation: Set automatic_failover_enabled = true for multi-region workloads.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers must enable Microsoft Entra authentication
controls.description: Centralized Microsoft Entra authentication must be enabled for PostgreSQL.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers must disable password authentication
controls.description: PostgreSQL must use Microsoft Entra authentication instead of local passwords.
controls.remediation: Set authentication.password_auth_enabled = false and configure an Entra administrator.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers must configure high availability
controls.description: Production PostgreSQL servers should use zone-redundant high availability.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers must have tags
controls.description: PostgreSQL servers must include ownership and governance metadata.

controls.title: PostgreSQL flexible servers should send diagnostics to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized database logs support auditing and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the PostgreSQL server.
